scripts.generate:openapi: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('backend/PaperlessREST/openapi/paperless.json',{force:true})" && dotnet build backend/PaperlessREST/PaperlessREST.csproj -tlp:ErrorsOnly && node -e "if(!require('node:fs').existsSync('backend/PaperlessREST/openapi/paperless.json')){console.error('paperless.json not generated — backend has no build-time OpenAPI emit yet; api-types.ts is hand-derived from the C# contract');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.generate: pnpm run generate:openapi && pnpm run generate:types
